title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iCliniq - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iCliniq - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
iCliniq invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About iCliniq:
iCliniq is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iCliniq!
